name: @microsoft/azure-speech
description: Transcribe audio to text using real-time, fast, or batch transcription modes with speaker diarization and language identification. Convert text to synthesized speech using neural, custom, or personal voices with SSML control over pronunciation and prosody. Generate photorealistic avatar videos from text. Translate speech across multiple languages. Verify and identify speakers by voice characteristics. Assess pronunciation accuracy, fluency, completeness, and prosody for language learning. Supports custom speech models trained on domain-specific data and LLM-enhanced transcription for captions, meeting summaries, and call center assistance.
